title: Map
subtitle: A mutable dictionary mapping Sequence keys to arbitrary values.

members.name: asJson
members.description: Converts a Map to a string that represents contents in JSON-compilant form

members.name: asList
members.description: Converts a Map to a list of lists. Each element in the returned list will be a list of two elements: the key, and the value.

members.name: asObject
members.description: Create a new Object whose slotDescriptionMap will be equal to self

members.name: at
members.description: Returns the value for the key keyString. Returns nil if the key is absent.

members.name: atIfAbsentPut
members.description:
If a value is present at the specified key, the value is returned.
    Otherwise, inserts/sets aValue and returns aValue.

members.name: atPut
members.description: Inserts/sets aValue with the key keyString. Returns self.

members.name: detect
members.description: Returns a random value for which message evals to non-nil.

members.name: empty
members.description: Removes all keys from the receiver. Returns self.

members.name: foreach
members.description:
For each key value pair, sets the locals key to the key and value to the value and executes message. Example: 
	aMap foreach(k, v, writeln(k, " = ", v))
aMap foreach(v, write(v))
Example use with a block: 
	myBlock = block(k, v, write(k, " = ", v, "\n"))
aMap foreach(k, v, myBlock(k, v))

members.name: hasKey
members.description: Returns true if the key is present or false otherwise.

members.name: hasValue
members.description: Returns true if the value is one of the Map's values or false otherwise.

members.name: isEmpty
members.description: Returns true if this map doesn't contain any pairs.

members.name: isNotEmpty
members.description: Returns true if this map contains at least one pair.

members.name: justSerialized
members.description: Writes the receiver's code into the stream.

members.name: keys
members.description: Returns a List of the receivers keys.

members.name: map
members.description:
Create a List of results of message applied to self's items in a random
		order.

members.name: merge
members.description: Returns a new map created by merging the pairs from anotherMap into this map

members.name: mergeInPlace
members.description: Merges the pairs from anotherMap into this map

members.name: removeAt
members.description: Removes the specified keyString if present. Returns self.

members.name: reverseMap
members.description: Creates a new Map using values as keys and keys as values

members.name: select
members.description:
Creates a new Map with keys,values of self for which message evaluated
		to non-nil.

members.name: size
members.description: Returns the number of key/value pairs in the receiver.

members.name: values
members.description: Returns a List of the receivers values.

members.name: with
members.description: Returns a new map containing the given keys and values
